meaning: n.婴儿,幼儿adj.婴儿的,幼稚的
examples: There was an infant squalling in the back of the church.
The nation's infant mortality rate has reached a record low.
Infant mortality is a reliable barometer of socio-economic conditions.
Staff Sergeant Edgar D Bledsoe, of Olive Branch, Illinois, cradles a critically ill Vietnamese infant.
Mature industries versus infant industries have three types of knowledge that give them a competitive edge.
